videoSnippet.title: The Actual Chosen One || Praggnanandhaa vs Vincent || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2733) - Keymer, Vincent (2759)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [19] 2026.06.05
E10 Queen's pawn game

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.e3 Be7 5.Nc3 O-O 6.cxd5 exd5 7.Bd3 Nc6 8.h3 Bd6 9.O-O Re8 10.Re1 h6 11.a3 Be6 12.b4 a6 13.Bb2 Qd7 14.b5 axb5 15.Bxb5 Qe7 16.Ne5 Bxa3 17.Bxa3 Rxa3 18.Bxc6 Rxa1 19.Qxa1 bxc6 20.Nxc6 Qd6 21.Ne5 Rc8 22.Rb1 c5 23.Nb5 Qf8 24.dxc5 Bf5 25.Rb3 Qxc5 26.Nd4 Qc1+ 27.Qxc1 Rxc1+ 28.Kh2 Be6 29.Rb6 Rf1 30.f4 h5 31.Rb8+ Kh7 32.Nef3 Ne4 33.f5 Bd7 34.Rd8 Ba4 35.Ne5 g6 36.Rf8 Nd6 37.fxg6+ Kg7 38.Ne6+ fxe6 39.Rxf1 Be8 40.Kg3 Bxg6 41.Kf4 h4 42.Ra1 Nf7 43.Ra7 Kf6 44.Ng4+ Kg7 45.Re7

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:45 Game Starts!
02:35 Completely New Game (Bd6)
09:45 IWITP
10:15 FINAL STANDINGS
13:00 Legends Of The Channel
